component.name: InputOTP
component.description: One-time password input with individual character slots.

useCases: Invite code or license key input

commonPatterns.name: six-digit-otp
commonPatterns.description: Standard 6-digit verification code with a separator
commonPatterns.composition: <InputOTP maxLength={6}><InputOTPGroup><InputOTPSlot index={0} /><InputOTPSlot index={1} /><InputOTPSlot index={2} /></InputOTPGroup><InputOTPSeparator /><InputOTPGroup><InputOTPSlot index={3} /><InputOTPSlot index={4} /><InputOTPSlot index={5} /></InputOTPGroup></InputOTP>

antiPatterns.scenario: Using InputOTP for general text input
antiPatterns.reason: InputOTP is designed for fixed-length codes; general text needs a standard Input
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Input for free-form text entry

antiPatterns.scenario: Mismatched maxLength and number of InputOTPSlot components
antiPatterns.reason: Each slot corresponds to a character index — mismatches break the UI
antiPatterns.alternative: Ensure the total number of InputOTPSlot components equals maxLength

antiPatterns.scenario: InputOTPSlot without the correct index prop
antiPatterns.reason: Each slot must reference its position to read from the OTP context correctly
antiPatterns.alternative: Pass sequential index values starting from 0

slots.InputOTPGroup: Visual grouping container for adjacent slots
slots.InputOTPSeparator: Visual separator between groups (renders a minus icon)

interactions.typing: Characters auto-advance to the next slot
interactions.backspace: Deletes current character and moves focus back
interactions.paste: Distributes pasted characters across all slots
interactions.focus: Active slot shows a blinking caret and a focus ring

responsive.mobile: Slots remain fixed-width; group wraps if needed

accessibility.role: Single hidden input managed by input-otp library
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Arrow keys between slots, Backspace to delete, paste support
accessibility.screenReader: Announced as a text input; individual slots are visual-only
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus ring on active slot via data-active; supports aria-invalid for error states

rules: maxLength must match the total number of InputOTPSlot components
InputOTPSlot index values must be sequential starting at 0
Use InputOTPSeparator between InputOTPGroup components for visual grouping
Use containerClassName on InputOTP to style the outer wrapper

aiHints.context: Use for fixed-length code entry (OTP, PIN, verification). Built on input-otp library. Always match maxLength to the number of slots. Group slots with InputOTPGroup and separate groups with InputOTPSeparator.
